questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The above argument would be most seriously weakened if it were found that (A) none of the substances in Serum D occurs naturally in the bodies of most species of the rabbit. (B) the rabbits in an experimental group had been kept strictly isolated from one another. (C) jungle fever is usually found only among victims of the severe South American Lesser Hooded Viper. (D) the scientists administering the injections were unaware of the subjects they were using. (E) one of the rabbits in the experimental group had Jungle Fever.

choices.a: none of the substances in Serum D occurs naturally in the bodies of most species of the rabbit.
choices.b: the rabbits in an experimental group had been kept strictly isolated from one another.
choices.c: jungle fever is usually found only among victims of the severe South American Lesser Hooded Viper.
choices.d: the scientists administering the injections were unaware of the subjects they were using.
choices.e: one of the rabbits in the experimental group had Jungle Fever.
